title: Heteroaryl compounds and their use as Mer inhibitors
abstract: Compounds of formula (I) [Formula should be inserted here] and a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof, wherein A, R1, R2, R3, R4, R5, R6, R7, R24, X, L, n and p are as defined in the specification, are useful for treating or preventing Mer tyrosine kinase receptor modulated disease or conditions. Also described are pharmaceutical compositions of compounds of formula (I), and methods for using such compounds and compositions.
